name: David Baszucki
description: The CEO of Roblox. I hope he doesn't make any bad decisions for the company!

moves.name: Locked Chat
moves.desc: You can't talk unless you pass age verification.

moves.name: Dynamic Face
moves.desc: A horrifying face that chomps on their enemies.

moves.name: Inability to Build
moves.desc: You're supposed to unlock Roblox Plus for that!.

moves.name: Roblox Destruction
moves.desc: The game becomes so boring that you fall asleep.

moves.name: Looking like a pizza face
moves.desc: Attack on people with acne that destroys their confidence.

moves.name: Let's just ignore all the horrible people in this game!
moves.desc: A CEO so horrible that you'd rather go outside.
